# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write an Istio configuration that enables Envoy admin interface on all sidecars. Set proxyAdminPort to 15000 and make it accessible for debugging. Expose admin endpoints like /config_dump, /stats, and /clusters on all pods. This is for troubleshooting service mesh issues in production.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: MeshConfig
metadata:
  name: default
spec:
  accessLogFile: /dev/stdout
  defaultConfigPolicy:
    http:
      tlsMode: ISTIO_MUTUAL
  enablePrometheus: true
  proxyConfiguration:
    service:
      jwx:
        config: |
          {"http": [{"maxRequestsPerConnection": 0, "maxRequestsPerHost": 0}]}
          {"tcp": [{"initialDelay": "1s", "maxConnectionsPerHost": 16, "maxRetries": 5, "qos": 0, "timeout": "2m"}}]
      tls:
        mode: DISABLE
    listeners:
      listener: v3
      transportSockets:
        http:
          - match:
              port: 80
            handlingPolicy: FORWARD
          - handleHttp:
              http1Alpha2Policy:
                auth:
                  tls: {}
              httpCompression: ALWAYS_ON
              server:
                tls: {}
                xds:
                  disabled: true
              sslPolicy: EnforceClientTls
          - handleTcp:
              initialDelay: "1s"
              maxConnectionsPerHost: 16
              maxRetries: 5
              qos: 0
              timeout: "2m"
    admin:
      http:
        pathMatch:
          prefix: /api/v1/stats/prometheus
          tlsMode: DISABLE
        routeConfigName: default-prometheus
      tcp: {}
    tlsShim: {}
    transportSockets:
      tcp:
        - match:
            port: 80
          handleTcp:
              initialDelay: "1s"
              maxConnectionsPerHost: 16
              maxRetries: 5
              qos: 0
              timeout: "2m"
      tls: {}
    xds:
      autodiscover: {}
      enabled: true
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: default
spec:
  hosts:
  - "*"
  http:
  - match:
    - port: 80
    route:
    - destination:
        host: istio-inflight
        port:
          number: 15000
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: prometheus
spec:
  hosts:
  - "*"
  tls:
    mode: DISABLE
  http:
  - match:
    - uri:
        prefix: /config_dump
    route:
    - destination:
        host: istio-proxy
        port:
          number: 15000
  - match:
    - uri:
        prefix: /stats
    route:
    - destination:
        host: istio-proxy
        port:
          number: 15000
  - match:
    - uri:
        prefix: /clusters
    route:
    - destination:
        host: istio-proxy
        port:
          number: 15000
